privileged_info_summary: The AuPbSn40 metallographic image is real data from the official ImageJ repository (600x412 px grayscale JPEG, last modified Jan 14 2017). The image_source URL in metadata is incorrect (returns 404); the correct working URLs are https://imagej.net/ij/images/AuPbSn40.jpg and https://wsr.imagej.net/images/AuPbSn40.jpg. The CSV column specification in metadata lists 4 columns, but the verifier only requires 3 columns ('phase', 'mean_thickness_px', 'max_thickness_px'), omitting 'std_thickness_px'. The task setup and output paths are correct. The Fiji Local Thickness plugin 'complete process' menu item is a valid Fiji feature.
